name: Hangzhou Anysoft Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Anysoft Information Technology Co., Ltd. aggregates and provides text and audio-visual content in China. The company provides users with digital reading through PC, smart phone, tablet, e-reader, car, wearable device, and other reading carriers. Its services include online literature, publishing books, magazines, newspapers, radio broadcasts, music and art talks, education and training lectures, etc. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
